title: thelypteris laevis
intro: Thelypteris laevis, also known as the smooth lady fern, is a species of fern native to North America, characterized by its delicate fronds and smooth stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris laevis are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and infusing the fronds in hot water, which can be used as a tea or applied topically as a salve or poultice.
